errors.timeout: Connection to the server timed out. Please try again.
errors.networkTimeout: A network error or server timeout occurred.

steps.narrative_render: Making the itinerary easier to read...
steps.semantic_planPreparing: Setting the overall flow for the trip...

errors.network: A network error occurred. Check your connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The server took too long to respond. Please try again.

generationCodes.draft_generation_timeout: Spot selection took too long. Try again with slightly narrower trip preferences.
generationCodes.draft_generation_invalid_output: The planner returned an incomplete trip skeleton, so the itinerary could not be completed. Please try again.
generationCodes.draft_generation_provider_error: There was a problem communicating with the AI service. Please try again in a moment.
generationCodes.narrative_generation_timeout: Finishing the itinerary took too long. Please try again.
generationCodes.narrative_generation_invalid_output: The narrative step returned an incomplete result, so the itinerary text could not be completed. Please try again.
generationCodes.narrative_generation_provider_error: There was a problem communicating with the AI service while finishing the itinerary. Please try again in a moment.

stepFailed.semantic_plan: AI spot selection failed. Please try again.
stepFailed.narrative_render: Failed to create the itinerary narrative. Please try again.
stepFailed.place_resolve: Location verification failed. Please try again.
stepFailed.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

warnings.title: Generated with limited verification
warnings.placeVerificationLimited: Google Places API has reached its usage limit, so some spot verification was skipped. Your itinerary was still generated, but you should recheck map locations and opening hours later.

errors.limitExceeded: You have reached your usage limit
